creator: pho@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Eitan Adler from comment #3)

I now see this with the same ssh test scenario:

root@t2:~ # sysctl vm.memguard.options=7
vm.memguard.options: 1 -> 7
root@t2:~ # panic: MemGuard detected double-free of 0xfffffe000201a000
cpuid = 5
time = 1550053301
KDB: stack backtrace:
db_trace_self_wrapper() at db_trace_self_wrapper+0x2b/frame 0xfffffe1fdc4276c0
vpanic() at vpanic+0x1b4/frame 0xfffffe1fdc427720
panic() at panic+0x43/frame 0xfffffe1fdc427780
memguard_free() at memguard_free+0x135/frame 0xfffffe1fdc4277c0
bufkva_free() at bufkva_free+0x87/frame 0xfffffe1fdc4277e0
brelse() at brelse+0x5ec/frame 0xfffffe1fdc427830
bufdone() at bufdone+0x48f/frame 0xfffffe1fdc4278b0
g_io_deliver() at g_io_deliver+0x298/frame 0xfffffe1fdc427900
g_io_deliver() at g_io_deliver+0x298/frame 0xfffffe1fdc427950
g_disk_done() at g_disk_done+0x109/frame 0xfffffe1fdc427990
dadone() at dadone+0x60f/frame 0xfffffe1fdc4279e0
xpt_done_process() at xpt_done_process+0x38b/frame 0xfffffe1fdc427a20
xpt_done_td() at xpt_done_td+0xf6/frame 0xfffffe1fdc427a70
fork_exit() at fork_exit+0x84/frame 0xfffffe1fdc427ab0
fork_trampoline() at fork_trampoline+0xe/frame 0xfffffe1fdc427ab0
--- trap 0, rip = 0, rsp = 0, rbp = 0 ---
KDB: enter: panic
[ thread pid 32 tid 100163 ]
Stopped at      kdb_enter+0x3b: movq    $0,kdb_why
db> x/s version
version:        FreeBSD 13.0-CURRENT #0 r344011: Wed Feb 13 11:15:49 CET 2019\012    pho@t2.osted.lan:/usr/src/sys/amd64/compile/MEMGUARD\012
db>
